subjects.description: woman preparing cinnamon rolls with honey
subjects.appearance_details: adult baker standing at a marble counter, carefully working over a tray of fresh rolls

subjects.relative_size: medium human scale, larger than the tray and counter props

context: A home baker finishes a batch of cinnamon rolls by adding honey before serving.

actions.description: The woman positions the spoon above the tray of cinnamon rolls.
Golden honey pours in a slow ribbon over the warm spiral rolls.
She finishes the drizzle and tilts the spoon back as the rolls glisten on the baking sheet.
